title: Section 2
content: In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires,-- (a) "Council" means the North-Eastern Council set up under section 3; 1[(b) "north-eastern area" means the area comprising the States of Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram,2[Nagaland, Sikkim and Tripura]];
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 69 of 1986, s. 45, for clauses (b) and (c) (w.e.f. 20-2-1987). 2. Subs. by Act 68 of 2002, s. 2, for "Nagaland and Tripura" (w.e.f. 26-6-2003).
